probes.q: Can xenobots live in freshwater lakes?
probes.note: fresh (<0.5 ppt), 4–45 °C, liquid water — within tolerance (sample data)

probes.q: Can xenobots live in brackish water?
probes.note: salinity 0.5–30 ppt exceeds the 0.5 ppt ceiling (sample data)

probes.q: Can xenobots survive in the Sahara?
probes.note: surface temps exceed 45 °C and no liquid water (sample data)
